attacking_style: Pure sprinter who capitalizes on flat stages rather than attacking. Wins from bunch sprints on stage finishes rather than breakaway or late-race attacks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns. Single race window shows positioning for sprint finishes but no detail on leadout or tempo control.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where bunch finishes are guaranteed. Explicitly vulnerable on mountain stages where he acknowledges inability to defend GC positions.
vulnerability: Mountain stages represent critical weakness - rider himself expressed uncertainty about holding GC lead on final climbing stage, indicating conscious awareness of limitations on steep terrain.
key_patterns: Sprint specialist with multiple stage wins in same race (4 stages at Taihu Lake).
Can hold GC jersey through sprint bonuses on flat stages before mountains arrive.
Self-aware of climbing limitations, acknowledging vulnerability before decisive mountain tests.
form_trajectory: unknown: Only single race window available from 2017, insufficient recent data to assess current trajectory or progression.
